description: Single queryset reused for count+iteration replaced with two identical DB queries for the same data.
diff:
diff --git a/orders.py b/orders.py
--- a/orders.py
+++ b/orders.py
@@ -1,5 +1,4 @@
 def get_user_summary(user_id):
-    orders = Order.objects.filter(user_id=user_id, status="completed")
-    count = orders.count()
-    total = sum(o.amount for o in orders)
+    count = Order.objects.filter(user_id=user_id, status="completed").count()
+    total = sum(o.amount for o in Order.objects.filter(user_id=user_id, status="completed"))
     return {"count": count, "total": total}
